texto: I have woken up inside one of my own memories. I am really here, yet I know I am not.

texto: Although I don't know much about anything, I know that I have a story. I know that it is not over. There are shades and shadows of adventures and people and wild new places. Whatever Paris might turn out to be, and whatever Dr. Epstein is able to do, I want to be there to find out.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Barr sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Although I don't know much about anything, I know that I have a story. I know that it is not over…” articula reflexao, adventures, life-story em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como life-story e people.

frase_original: Although I don't know much about anything, I know that I have a story. I know that it is not over. There are shades and shadows of adventures and people and wild new places. Whatever Paris might turn out to be, and whatever Dr. Epstein is able to do, I want to be there to find out.

texto: Time is a random thing. It is the thing that makes us older. Humans use it to organize the world. They have invented a system to try to make order from randomness. The other humans, all of them but me, live their lives by hours and minutes and days and seconds, but those things are nothing. The universe would laugh at our attempts to organize it, if it could be bothered to notice them. Time is the thing that makes our bodies shrivel and decay. That is why people are scared of it.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Barr sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Time is a random thing. It is the thing that makes us older. Humans use it to organize the world.…” articula humor, flora-banks, time em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como time e universe.
